Is Aurita a good DPS?

Aurita is more like a sub dps that converts tentacle dmg into burst dmg
her own dps is low but she can trigger 20+ red tentacle hits with exalt
you still need other characters to build tentacle dmg

Admist the Downpour for Xu, you ideally want to raise it to E3 and for Myriam you can use General Keyflare WoDs like Incalculable Factor & Elevated Focus
You can obtain both Amidst the Downpour & Incalculable Factor from Standard WoD Banner
For Xu's SR WoD, you can use the one that you can obtain from her Event
I can select both of those
Faint can use her own Sig WoD (Lullaby Devoured) from the Standard WoD Banner and Cloaked In The Night
Faros can use Rewinding Time which you can obtain from the Lightless Shop and your choice of SR WoD

Mouchette - Casiah - Horla - Erica/Winkle works, but you really want Horla's E1, cause otherwise you'll struggle with lack of debuffs
Xu - Daffodil - Casiah - Salvador works too

In the second team, she should also be your first rouse priority, since you use her to stack strength for Daff

what is mouche bis set?
Dependent on your investment level
Crimson pulse if u wanna burst, burial if u wanna use autobattle xd

If you have enough crit rate, run either Dream or Burial
Otherwise either Crimson or April's
Aww so I am sorta E locked and I don't think it worth using Horizons yet.

Crimson Pulse (don't forget to Posse during your Burst Turn to obtain 30% Temp Crit Rate)

Dreams of Medicine (grants addictional Copies of both Shining Tornado & Mortal Blast) 

April Tribute (you gain 35% Temp Crit Rate / Damage when your Target is above 75% of their maximum Health)

Main Stat should be Crit Rate > Damage (1, 2, 3), Death Resistance (5, 6) and Keyflare (4)

Sub Stat Priority should be Crit Rate > Death Resistance > Crit Damage > Keyflare
